description: Process the sales pipeline export in ~/Documents/pipeline_forecast.xlsx using WPS Spreadsheet. In the 'Opportunities' sheet, calculate 'Probability' (mapped from the 'Stage_Probabilities' sheet), 'Weighted_Value' (Amount multiplied by Probability), and 'Deal_Tier' (Tier 1 for >=100,000, Tier 2 for >=50,000, and Tier 3 for others) in columns G, H, and I. Create a summary sheet named 'Rep_Summary' that calculates the 'Total_Pipeline' and 'Weighted_Forecast' for Darcel C. Miller, Vicki M. Lee, John A. Smith, and Sarah B. Jones. Format the summary values as currency and save the completed workbook to ~/Documents/pipeline_forecast_completed.xlsx.
